"person" : "unlock"} /> <Input autoCapitalize="none" autoCorrect={false} style={{ color: "#fff" }} placeholderTextColor="#fff" ref={c => (this.textInput = c)} placeholder={input.name === "email" ? "Email" : "Password"} secureTextEntry={input.name === "password" ? true : false} onChangeText={input.name === "email" ?
